title: Break and Continue
description: Control loop execution: exit early or skip iterations.

slides.title: Breaking Out
Skipping an Iteration
break and continue in Action
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
$numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6];
foreach ($numbers as $num) {
    if ($num % 2 == 0) {
        continue;
    }
    echo "$num ";
}
foreach ($numbers as $num) {
    if ($num > 4) {
        break;
    }
    echo "$num ";
}
?>

slides.title: Break with Levels

quizData.explanation: i=0,1,2 print; i=3 skipped; i=4 prints → 0124.
